units.content: identifying cyclic subgraphs from a directed graph induced by records and structured pointers
inferring that each cyclic subgraph contains at least one record with a third predetermined source tag value
inferring that each cyclic subgraph contains at least one record with one of the first two predetermined source tag values
computing a spectral-radius metric from linearization of subgraph dynamics near current state for each cyclic subgraph
evaluating whether a cyclic subgraph's spectral-radius metric meets or exceeds a predetermined threshold
emitting a typed cycle annotation for each cyclic subgraph whose spectral-radius metric meets or exceeds the threshold
